title.en: It's just that this place can accommodate the E...

content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian came to the land of the Extreme Mountains through the Extreme Mountain Order.

As soon as he entered the Extreme Mountain Land, Ye Tian found that this place was similar to the Extreme Dao Source Sea and the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, and it was a special area opened up by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace's Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

It's just that this place can accommodate the Extreme Realm Perfect Master.

"The land of the Extreme Mountains is not big, it is only the size of a realm, and this place can even move!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Polar Mountains are supposed to be in the depths of time and space, very close to the primordial Black Sea, and it is constantly moving, with no fixed coordinates.

The Polar Mountain Order can connect to the magic circle in the Land of the Extreme Mountain, so it can travel to the Land of the Extreme Mountain at any time.

Moreover, there is even a trace of the Extreme Space Extreme Dao inside the Extreme Mountain Order, which should be a secret treasure refined by a strong person who has comprehended the Extreme Space Extreme Dao.

As soon as he entered the land of the Extreme Mountains, Ye Tian was discovered by many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

"Disciple of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord, why is he here?"

"It seems that the Ice and Snow Palace Master gave her disciple an Extreme Mountain Order!"

"What's the use of the Ice Palace Master's disciple coming here, what good things can he have?

"It's just that ordinary treasures are not qualified to be traded here!"

One by one, the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm were secretly communicating, not only did they not dare to talk openly about the disciples of the Ice and Snow Palace Master!

In the entire Extreme Dao Deep Sea, which Extreme Realm Perfect Controller level Extreme Dao creatures didn't know that the Ice and Snow Palace Lord was the most protective, so they only dared to discuss it in private.

Many Extreme Realm Perfection Masters have set up shop in the Extreme Mountains, buying treasures they need or selling things they don't need.

Of course, those Extreme Perfect Masters rarely stay here, and only come here occasionally, so there will not be more than a hundred Extreme Perfect Masters here.

Most of the time, it's still the top Realm Perfect Controllers, and the Extreme Dao creatures are active.

For example, the shops opened by those Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace are all their subordinates who stay here and take charge of the shops for them.

And all stores have a common acquisition need, that is, to buy treasures that contain the ultimate way, and no one has too many such treasures.

Ye Tian walked around, and then decided to open a shop himself.

Bang!!!!!

A huge palace stands in the middle of a mountain, the size of a small world.

And Ye Tian quickly put out the purchase demand, and he proposed to use the Primordial Thunder Stone and the Primordial Black Armor Fragment to purchase other treasures containing the Extreme Extreme, with no limit to types.

In this way, there will definitely be the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, who will come to trade with him.

In this way, it didn't take long for a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm to come to Ye Tian, and he was also Ye Tian's enemy, the Lord of the Dragon and Snake!

"I've seen the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Lord of the Golden Wings, do you really have the Primordial Black Armor Fragment and the Primordial Thunderstone in your hands?"

The Lord of the Dragon and Serpent asked curiously.

"Yes, is the Dragon Snake the main deal?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake nodded, "I have a treasure in my hand that contains the Extreme Shadow Path, are you sure you want to trade it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He knew why the Lord of the Dragon and Snake didn't trade with others, the Extreme Shadow Extreme Dao was a very remote Extreme Dao, if it was the Extreme Dao of time, space, the Five Elements, etc., it was definitely a popular Extreme Dao, and the Extreme Dao creatures who cultivated the Shadow Extreme Dao were too rare, and the Extreme Dao creatures at the level of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller were estimated to not have majored in the Shadow Extreme Dao, so the Dragon and Snake Lord couldn't trade at all.

This time, he did not restrict the Extreme Extreme Dao type to acquire, which made the Lord of the Dragon Snake excited, and after knowing the news, he came to trade as soon as possible.

"I'm going to trade the Primordial Black Armor Shard!"

The Lord of the Dragon and Serpent.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the Lord of the Dragon and Snake completed the transaction and obtained the treasure in the other party's hand - the Shadow Grass!

"That's right, I obtained a treasure containing the Extreme Dao so quickly, and I won't have to worry about cultivating in the future!" Ye Tian said happily.

It's a pity that he still hasn't found the treasure that contains the extreme time of time, if he does, he will make a lot of money!

Not long after, another Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, came to Ye Tian to trade, and the other party traded the Primordial Thunder Stone from Ye Tian with a treasure containing the Extreme Blood Extreme.

After that, another Extreme Realm Perfect Controller used the treasure containing the Extreme Dao of the Extreme Sword to trade away another piece of Primordial Black Armor Fragment from Ye Tian's hand.

At this point, the Primordial Black Armor Fragment and the Primordial Thunder Stone on Ye Tian's body were gone.

As for the treasures that have just been acquired, they must not be asked for by the Extreme Dao creatures, otherwise the Lord of the Dragon and Snake would have traded with others a long time ago.

"That's it for the time being, wait until the Shadow Extreme Dao, the Blood Extreme Dao, and the Sword Extreme Dao have all cultivated to the extreme realm, and then go collect the treasures containing the Extreme Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered

Time flies.

Ye Tian's copy body of the Golden-winged Peng Bird has been upgraded to the realm of the True Realm Perfect Controller, and with many resources, it has been raised to the peak level of this realm, although the cultivation speed is too fast, but fortunately, he has the master of the Ice and Snow Palace Master, so other extreme creatures don't feel strange!

On this day, Ye Tian finally cultivated the Shadow Extreme Dao to the extreme realm.

After cultivating to the extreme realm of the Shadow Extreme Dao, Ye Tian went to the Primordial Black Sea to cultivate, and found that he could stay in the Primordial Black Sea for dozens of eternal years.

"According to this level of improvement, if I comprehend another extreme path, I am afraid that I will be able to stay in the Primordial Black Sea for tens of billions of eternal years!"

Ye Tian guessed.

So in the following years, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Blood with all his might.

Finally, it took him more than 10 billion eternal years to comprehend and cultivate the Blood Extreme Dao to the limit.

Not only that, Ye Tian's other copy bodies also took the time to comprehend other extreme paths, and more and more of their limits were cultivated by Ye Tian to the consummation realm.

But even so, Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao still hadn't cultivated to the Consummation Realm, and was currently in the late stage of the Dacheng Realm, and it was still far from Consummation.

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian had been cultivating here since he had comprehended the Extreme Blood Path, and now that billions of eternal years had passed, he was still not rejected by the Primordial Black Sea.

"Sure enough, I can at least stay here for tens of billions of eternal years, and I won't wait for the day when I am excluded and left, I can comprehend the extreme path of the Extreme Sword again, it seems that I can't test how long it will take me to be rejected by the Primordial Black Sea!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, his ascension speed was too fast, and he wanted the Primordial Black Sea to exclude him, unless he had not cultivated all the time and had been in this state of stagnation.

"No more testing, with my progress rate, I can stay in the Primordial Black Sea almost forever, so I can build a dojo here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was going to build the dojo in the very far depths of the primordial Black Sea, so that it would be safer.

So, Ye Tian kept shuttling in the Primordial Black Sea, positioning countless times, and finally after a long time, he determined a location and began to build a dojo.

In the future, this ashram is also the place where he majored, and it is also the safest place.
